# GRAND IDEALS - CLASS ENGINEERING
[color=#a4885c]Ship Size:[/color] Large
[color=#a4885c]Recommended Crew:[/color] 4+
[color=#a4885c]Power Gen Type:[/color] AME
# Shuttle Brief
"A completely gutted Ambition designed for long-term salvaging expeditions and complete customization of it's innards. Features a light medical suite for hazardous circumstances."

# Hiring crew
[textlink="Hiring" link="Hiring"/]
As a Captain of a Spacefaring vessel, you have the authority to hire, fire, demote, or promote crew members at will.
